decision_note: The proposition may be mysterious; the field cannot be.
Current production baseline hides the action at 1280×720.

measurement_after_test: Credibility rating plus verbatim trust reason
decision_note: Proof-led remains 2 until its concept surface is replaced by a genuinely inspectable artefact.
Sparse signal retains the visual grammar without an invented instrument panel.
Founder-led wording helps; form alone cannot guarantee warmth.

measurement_after_test: Reading-order task plus WCAG / information-loss audit
decision_note: All prototypes move actions before the secondary right-side content.
Ordinal screening only. Human gates override this prior; do not treat decimals as behavioural precision.
